Basically, this will be an enemies to lovers AU and uh yeah! I’m in so many fandoms i can’t even count them all, hehe. So you guys can suggest me any characters in the comments and I’ll try to make bots of them! I don’t have much to ramble about today, so bye bye and enjoy the chat sessionnnn!
